## Support

Feature-level support tracking with repo test references and optional test262 evidence.

### 25.2 ([tc39.es](https://tc39.es/ecma262/#sec-sharedarraybuffer-objects))

| Feature name | Status | Test scripts | test262 evidence | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| SharedArrayBuffer objects | Not Yet Supported |  |  | JROC currently implements fixed-length ArrayBuffer-oriented binary data only. SharedArrayBuffer, growable shared buffers, and multi-agent shared-memory semantics are not exposed. |
